creator: bahlgren@beah.se
text:
Hiroki Sato <hrs@FreeBSD.org> writes:

>  So, can you try to create a simple wrapper script that removes
>  LD_LIBRARY_PATH and exec kprinter, and then enter its filename in the
>  print dialog?

Yes, I have tried that - it works!  (The simpler "env -u
LD_LIBRARY_PATH kprinter" directly in the print dialogue works too.)

Bengt
